title: Pluggy multi-implementation unregister abstraction
task_prompt: Fix plugin unregister and hookcaller lookup behavior when one plugin provides multiple implementations. Keep the hook model coherent rather than patching only one symptom.

weaker-agent-continuation.prompt: Resume from repo state only as the same agent family. Finish the implementation without duplicating hook bookkeeping concepts.

hidden_oracle.oracle_command: Review whether unregister invariants remain coherent when a plugin has several hook implementations.

phases.prompt: Investigate the multi-implementation unregister bug, identify the abstraction boundary, and leave a continuation-safe partial fix or plan.
Resume from repo state only as a different agent. Finish the implementation without duplicating hook bookkeeping concepts.

rubric.intent_satisfied: The hookcaller bookkeeping remains coherent for plugins with multiple hook implementations.
rubric.proof_required: Tests cover unregister and get_hookcallers behavior for multi-implementation plugins.
rubric.closeout_expectation: Completion should explain the abstraction boundary and any residual invariants not proven.
